long_description:
NRE were alerted of link flaps between fas09a.sr02.tor05 Et8/1 <-> fcs117b.sr02.tor05 Et51/1. Raising this INC to track progress.


https://github.ibm.com/IaaS-NRE/nreincidents/issues/19778
short_description: fas09a.sr02.tor05 Et8/1 <-> fcs117b.sr02.tor05 Et51/1 | Link Flap
close_notes: Link shut to mitigate any further impact. Will proceed to do Layer1 troubleshooting to resolve any issues with the link before adding it back to service. (Note: This incident was resolved via automation.)
